name: ezrnd-flow-main
description: EZRND Flow Main monorepo: Next.js frontend, Node.js API, SQLite DB, and LangChain JS agent.

scripts.clean: rm -rf .turbo apps/*/dist packages/*/dist apps/web/.next apps/web/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo node_modules package-lock.json
scripts.openwiki:init: node scripts/run-openwiki.mjs init "Generate and maintain agent-facing documentation for this AI Arch monorepo. Emphasize implementation evidence useful for an academic paper about building the system, not paper generation inside the product."
scripts.openwiki:update: node scripts/run-openwiki.mjs update "Update the wiki from recent code and documentation changes. Keep the research evidence pages current for a paper about developing this system."
